name: archive-audit-s0-promotions
purpose: One-time audit script that demoted incorrectly elevated S0 severity items in MASTER_DEBT.jsonl back to S1/S2 using a git baseline commit (08763212) as the reference point.
notes: CJS module. 13.3KB. Archived Apr 11. Uses './lib/read-jsonl' and './lib/safe-fs' relative paths — BROKEN relative to archive/ location (was originally at scripts/debt/ or scripts/ root). References MASTER_DEBT.jsonl and raw/deduped.jsonl SoNash-specific paths. One-time operational script; value is reference for severity demotion logic. Not portable.

name: archive-backfill-hashes
purpose: One-time migration to backfill missing content_hash values in MASTER_DEBT.jsonl using the same algorithm as intake-audit.js.
notes: CJS module. 5.4KB. Archived Apr 11. Uses '../lib/' relative paths (correct — scripts/lib/ is parent dir). References MASTER_DEBT.jsonl directly. Depends on generate-content-hash which is a shared lib. Migration complete; no operational value.

name: archive-decompose-state
purpose: One-time migration to decompose deep-plan.state.json into separate purpose-specific JSONL files (decisions, tenets, directives, ideas, coordination) per D77 architectural decision.
notes: ESM module (import statements). 4.5KB. Archived Apr 6. Outputs to .planning/system-wide-standardization/ SoNash-specific path. Migration was one-time; the decomposed JSONL files are now the live data. Import of safe-fs uses '../lib/safe-fs.js' (.js extension, correct for ESM).

name: archive-migrate-ecosystem-v2
purpose: One-time data recovery migration to merge orphaned review records from data/ecosystem-v2/reviews.jsonl into canonical .claude/state/reviews.jsonl, fixing a pipeline split-brain bug (write-review-record.ts wrote to wrong path).
notes: CJS module ('use strict'). 8.8KB. No shebang. Archived Apr 8. Supports --dry-run and --apply flags. Documents root cause: write-review-record.ts wrote to ecosystem-v2 but readers expected .claude/state/. Uses '../lib/safe-fs' (correct path). Provides context for reviews pipeline fracture. v1.0 2026-03-18.

name: archive-migrate-retros
purpose: One-time migration to extract retrospective data from markdown and write structured entries to retros.jsonl using the writeRetroRecord API.
notes: CJS module. 8.2KB. Archived Apr 8. Depends on ./dist/write-retro-record.js (CJS compiled output from reviews/dist/) via relative path from archive/ — BROKEN (reviews/dist is one level up, not in archive/). Contains hardcoded PR retro data (PR 395+, dates 2026-02-27+). One-time migration complete. SoNash-specific PR numbers.

name: archive-repair-archives
purpose: One-time repair to deduplicate and consolidate overlapping REVIEWS_*.md archive files into clean non-overlapping range files (groups of 40), backfilling from JSONL archive data.
notes: CJS module. 14.9KB. Archived Apr 11. Supports dry-run (default) and --apply flag. Uses '../lib/' paths (correct). Repair complete; the REVIEWS_*.md files are now clean. Provides reference for archive range logic and dedup strategy.

name: archive-reverify-resolved
purpose: One-time re-verification of 62 RESOLVED TDMS items flagged as possibly-unresolved by a resolution audit; categorized items as FALSE_ALARM, FILE_MISSING, GENUINELY_UNRESOLVED, or ALREADY_VERIFIED.
notes: CJS module. 16.1KB. Archived Apr 11. Supports dry-run (default) and --write flag. Uses '../lib/' paths (correct). Verifies against live code files (fs.readFileSync on source paths). Provides reference for resolution verification logic. SoNash TDMS-specific.

name: archive-run-consolidation-v1
purpose: v1 of the consolidation pipeline; JSONL-based pattern consolidation from reviews.jsonl to CODE_PATTERNS.md. Archived when superseded by review-lifecycle.js.
notes: CJS module. 30.3KB. Archived Apr 11. Uses './lib/safe-fs' and './lib/security-helpers' relative paths — BROKEN relative to archive/ location (needs ../lib/). Supports dry-run, --apply, --auto, --verbose, --force flags. The README explicitly documents this as superseded by run-consolidation.js. Largest archive file after sync-reviews-to-jsonl.js. Rich reference for consolidation logic.

name: archive-sync-reviews-to-jsonl
purpose: v2 MD-to-JSONL sync bridge; parsed AI_REVIEW_LEARNINGS_LOG.md into .claude/state/reviews.jsonl. Archived when superseded by review-lifecycle.js which unified sync+archive+validate+render.
notes: CJS module. 46.6KB — largest file in archive/ by far. Archived Apr 11. Comments reference 'v1 fallback at scripts/sync-reviews-to-jsonl.v1.js' but that file no longer exists. Uses '../lib/' paths (correct). Supports --apply, --check, --repair flags. The README explicitly documents this as superseded by review-lifecycle.js. Rich reference for markdown-to-JSONL parsing logic and edge-case handling.

name: test-generate-lifecycle-scores-md
purpose: Tests for generate-lifecycle-scores-md.js: validates readJsonl, generateMarkdown, and run() with lifecycle-scores JSONL fixtures from the TDMS Data Effectiveness Audit (Wave 5.1).
notes: CJS module. node:test runner. Tests lifecycle-scores JSONL schema (id, date, schema_version, completeness fields). Uses os.tmpdir() for isolation. Not portable — tests SoNash-specific TDMS lifecycle-scores schema. Part of Wave 5.1 Data Effectiveness Audit.

name: test-learning-router
purpose: Functional tests for scripts/lib/learning-router.js: validates route(), scaffoldVerifiedPattern(), trackVerifiedPattern() with temp-dir isolation. Part of Wave 2.1 Data Effectiveness Audit.
sanitize_fields: scaffoldVerifiedPattern paths reference SoNash config structure
notes: CJS module. node:test runner with beforeEach/afterEach temp-dir lifecycle. Tests required fields, tracking, and schema validation. Functional (not string-only assertions). Portable if learning-router.js is ported.

name: test-lifecycle-scores-integrity
purpose: Data integrity tests for .claude/state/lifecycle-scores.jsonl: validates schema, score math (total=capture+storage+recall+action), enum values, uniqueness, and non-empty arrays. Part of test gap fill Tasks 19/20.
notes: CJS module. node:test runner. Reads live .claude/state/lifecycle-scores.jsonl — tests the DATA not a script. Score range validation: 0-3 per dimension, 0-12 total. Not portable: lifecycle-scores.jsonl is TDMS-specific. Validates orphan detection (all enum values used at least once).

name: test-positive-patterns-coverage
purpose: Tests POSITIVE_PATTERNS.md section ID coverage (S1-S25), sequential completeness, and cross-reference integrity between code-reviewer SKILL.md and CODE_PATTERNS.md. Part of test gap fill Tasks 21/22.
notes: CJS module. node:test runner. Reads live docs files (POSITIVE_PATTERNS.md, CODE_PATTERNS.md). Tests structural integrity of SoNash-specific pattern doc system. Not portable: pattern IDs S1-S25 are SoNash-specific. No imports of external scripts.

name: test-ratchet-baselines
purpose: Semantic tests for scripts/ratchet-baselines.js: validates ratchet logic mutations, history appending, regression detection, dry-run isolation, and JSON output shape. Part of Wave 6.3 Data Effectiveness Audit.
sanitize_fields: BASELINE_PATH hardcoded to .claude/state/known-debt-baseline.json — SoNash-specific path used in module load
notes: CJS module. node:test runner with beforeEach/afterEach. Uses cache-busting (delete require.cache) to test baseline path overrides. Temporarily overwrites real BASELINE_PATH for isolation. Portable if ratchet-baselines.js is ported and state path updated.

name: test-review-lifecycle
purpose: Tests the review lifecycle orchestrator's SYNC/ARCHIVE/VALIDATE/RENDER steps and CLI parsing; uses temp directories for file isolation. Tests parseMarkdownReviews and ARCHIVE_THRESHOLD constants.
notes: CJS module. node:test runner with beforeEach/afterEach temp-dir lifecycle. Imports parseMarkdownReviews, ARCHIVE_THRESHOLD, KEEP_NEWEST from review-lifecycle.js. Tests markdown #### Review #N and ### PR #N Retrospective parsing. Portable if review-lifecycle.js is ported.

name: test-route-enforcement-gaps
purpose: Tests extractGaps and routeGaps functions from scripts/route-enforcement-gaps.js against behavioral guardrail content. Part of Wave 4.2 Data Effectiveness Audit.
sanitize_fields: Guardrail text fixtures reference SoNash-specific CLAUDE.md content
notes: CJS module. node:test runner. Inline fixtures reproduce CLAUDE.md Behavioral Guardrails section format. Pure logic tests — no file I/O. Portable if route-enforcement-gaps.js is ported.

name: test-route-lifecycle-gaps
purpose: Tests readJsonl and categorizeGap from scripts/route-lifecycle-gaps.js; uses temp-dir isolation for JSONL reads. Part of test gap fill.
notes: CJS module. node:test runner with temp-dir isolation. Tests JSONL reading and gap categorization. Relatively generic logic; portable if route-lifecycle-gaps.js is ported.

name: test-verify-enforcement
purpose: Functional tests for scripts/verify-enforcement.js: validates run(), verifyEntry(), evaluateMetrics(), and runEnforcementTest() with temp-dir isolation and real state file testing. Part of Wave 2.3 Data Effectiveness Audit.
sanitize_fields: evaluateMetrics thresholds reference SoNash-tuned gate values
notes: CJS module. node:test runner with beforeEach/afterEach. Tests exit-code behavior, data structures, and enforcement verification logic. Functional (real functions, real files). Portable if verify-enforcement.js is ported.

name: test-wave6-alerts
purpose: Tests Wave 6 alert checker logic from run-alerts.js by reimplementing the detection conditions inline as test helpers (does NOT import run-alerts.js); validates with real JSONL written to temp files.
notes: CJS module. node:test runner. Notable: test file reimplements run-alerts.js logic inline rather than importing it — this is a testing pattern for scripts that are hard to import cleanly. The test file is self-contained but tightly coupled to run-alerts.js JSONL schema. Not portable: alert thresholds and JSONL field names are SoNash-specific.

name: test-wave9-defense-depth
purpose: Tests three Wave 9 components: (1) conflict resolution in learning-router.js route(), (2) checkEnforcementVerification() logic inline from run-alerts.js, (3) scripts/config/verified-patterns.json schema and cross-references.
notes: CJS module. node:test runner. Imports learning-router.js but reimplements run-alerts.js logic inline. Validates verified-patterns.json fields: id, anti_pattern, positive_pattern_ref, enforcement, severity. Cross-references scripts/config/verified-patterns.json which is a dependency. Not portable: pattern IDs and severity schema are SoNash-specific.

name: test-dedup-review-metrics
purpose: Functional test for scripts/metrics/dedup-review-metrics.js: verifies that dedupMetrics() removes duplicate PR entries keeping the latest, and annotates round counts from reviews.jsonl. Regression guard for retro action item #8.
notes: CJS module. node:test runner with beforeEach/afterEach. Uses findProjectRoot() helper to locate project root dynamically. v1.0 2026-03-18. Functional test with real JSONL fixtures in temp dirs. Portable if dedup-review-metrics.js is ported.
